message:
Add reusable sync action for source repositories

Source repos can now trigger changelog sync with:

  uses: tenzir/news/.github/actions/sync@main

The action infers the project name automatically and supports
configurable path, target repo, and ref parameters.

Also renames the workflow from update.yaml to sync.yaml and
adds 'test' as an allowed project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+name: Sync Changelog
+description: Trigger changelog sync to tenzir/news
+
+inputs:
+  project:
+    description: Project name
+    required: false
+    default: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
+  path:
+    description: Path to changelog in source repo
+    required: false
+    default: changelog
+  token:
+    description: GitHub token with workflow trigger permissions
+    required: true
+  target:
+    description: Target repository to sync to
+    required: false
+    default: tenzir/news
+  ref:
+    description: Branch to trigger the workflow on
+    required: false
+    default: main
+
+runs:
+  using: composite
+  steps:
+    - name: Trigger sync workflow
+      shell: bash
+      env:
+        GH_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.token }}
+      run: |
+        gh workflow run sync.yaml \
+          --repo "${{ inputs.target }}" \
+          --ref "${{ inputs.ref }}" \
+          --field project="${{ inputs.project }}" \
+          --field path="${{ inputs.path }}"

@@ -1,15 +1,16 @@
-name: Update
+name: Sync
 
 on:
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
       project:
-        description: "Project to update"
+        description: "Project to sync"
         required: true
         type: choice
         options:
           - tenzir
           - docs
+          - test
       path:
         description: "Path to changelog directory in source repo"
         required: false
@@ -20,7 +21,7 @@ permissions:
   contents: write
 
 concurrency:
-  group: "update"
+  group: "sync"
   cancel-in-progress: false
 
 jobs:
@@ -30,14 +31,14 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Validate project parameter
         run: |
-          if [[ "${{ inputs.project }}" != "tenzir" && "${{ inputs.project }}" != "docs" ]]; then
-            echo "Error: project must be either 'tenzir' or 'docs'"
+          if [[ "${{ inputs.project }}" != "tenzir" && "${{ inputs.project }}" != "docs" && "${{ inputs.project }}" != "test" ]]; then
+            echo "Error: project must be 'tenzir', 'docs', or 'test'"
             exit 1
           fi
           echo "Valid project: ${{ inputs.project }}"
 
-  update:
-    name: Update Changelog
+  sync:
+    name: Sync Changelog
     needs: validate
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
@@ -83,7 +84,7 @@ jobs:
             echo "No changes needed for ${{ inputs.project }} changelog"
           else
             git add .
-            git commit -m "Update ${{ inputs.project }} changelog"
+            git commit -m "Sync ${{ inputs.project }} changelog"
             git push
-            echo "Updated and committed ${{ inputs.project }} changelog"
+            echo "Synced ${{ inputs.project }} changelog"
           fi
